findings.issue: Druidcraft is a Druid cantrip, not available to Rangers; Rangers should choose from their own spell list (e.g., Prestidigitation, Mending)
findings.correction: cantrips should contain a Ranger cantrip

findings.issue: 6 skill proficiencies is too many for a level 1 Ranger; Rangers typically have 4-5 depending on background and class features
